author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: testssl_recheck
summary: Re-runs testssl.sh narrowly against the same host:port and checks whether the original test id still reports HIGH/CRITICAL/MEDIUM. Validates cipher lists, cipher order, protocol availability, FS posture, BREACH/BEAST/LUCKY13/etc.

args.--url: Target host[:port] or full URL (required). Probe re-targets host:port.
args.--testssl-id: Optional explicit testssl test id (e.g. cipher_order-tls1). When omitted, the probe pulls it from the finding's raw_data via the orchestrator-passed config.
args.--narrow-timeout: Subprocess timeout for the narrow testssl run (default 120s).
